items.title: The $40K Standing Ovation
items.detail: Story: CEO spent $40K on a speaker. Standing ovation. By Thursday, every pattern was back. Hype doesn't reach the root. P.S. ADDED: Columbus AI Event — 'I'm going deep on this in person. May 6 in Columbus... why AI now outperforms most leadership teams, and why it reveals the same identity crisis that $40K speaker couldn't touch.'
items.cta: None (Sunday soil-tilling) + P.S. Columbus event register link
items.source: Composite coaching scenario + March 25 Live themes

items.title: 48 Hours After the Standing Ovation
items.detail: Story: CEO spent $40K on a speaker. 48 hours later, every pattern was back. The COO ran meetings like depositions. The VP cc'd the CEO on every email. Nobody failed. But you can't motivate your way past a fear you haven't named.
items.cta: Reflection prompt (no link)

items.title: She Felt It Slipping
items.detail: Story: Inspired crying at the offsite. By Wednesday, yelling at her assistant. Motivation targets the 97%, but leadership is defined by the 3% under pressure. Lunch with Chris promo. P.S. ADDED: Columbus AI Event — 'AI doesn't have a 3%. No insecurity. No proving. No hiding. That's why it outperforms most teams.'
items.cta: YouTube Live reminder + P.S. Columbus event register link
items.source: Composite coaching scenario + March 25 Live + Week 5 outline

items.title: Meet Michael the Motivational Speaker
items.detail: Video premiere: Meet Michael. He walks in with a wireless mic and a story about climbing Kilimanjaro that connects to quarterly revenue. Your team leaves fired up. Nothing changes. It's the Taco Bell sauce of leadership development.
items.cta: Watch. Tag someone who manages like this.

items.title: Your Best People Aren't Leaving Because of Comp
items.detail: Your best people aren't leaving because of compensation. They're leaving because of your environment. The culture you think you have and the culture your people actually experience are almost never the same thing. That's drift.

items.title: The 97/3 Principle
items.detail: Framework: Most leadership development addresses the 97% when things are going fine. But your leadership is defined by the 3% — when someone challenges you, when your best performer leaves, when you don't have the answer. That deeper operating system is built on fear, not training.
items.cta: IFQ link in comments
